title: EmbedConfig
description: Configuration object passed by a host application to initialize an embedded widget, JS SDK, or iframe experience.

provider.description: Vendor providing the embeddable widget or SDK.

widget_type.description: Category of embeddable experience being rendered.

embed_mode.description: How the widget is mounted into the host page.

container_selector.description: CSS selector or DOM id of the host element that should mount the widget.

publishable_key.description: Public, browser-safe key issued by the provider that authorizes the embed.

session_token.description: Short-lived, server-issued token scoped to a single embed session (e.g. Plaid link token, Looker embed JWT).

theme.description: Theming overrides applied to the embedded experience.

locale.description: BCP 47 locale code used to localize the embed UI.

allowed_origins.description: Host origins permitted to load this embed (configured server-side and enforced via CSP and frame-ancestors).

events.description: Lifecycle and domain events the host wants to subscribe to via postMessage or SDK callbacks.
